title: ageratina jalpana
intro: Ageratina jalpana, also known as Jalpana, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ageratina jalpana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ageratina jalpana can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
